title: Warehouse Assistant
description:
Job Title: Warehouse Assistant

About the Role
We’re looking for an experienced Warehouse Assistant who knows how a warehouse runs — from inbound receiving to outbound dispatch. You’ll be working across both B2B and B2C operations, handling WMS transactions, order processing, and day-to-day warehouse activities. This role requires someone who is hands-on, detail-oriented, and hungry to learn and grow with the team.

What You’ll Do

  • Handle full warehouse processes: inbound, put-away, picking, packing, outbound, and returns
  • Operate the Warehouse Management System (WMS) accurately for all transactions
  • Use Excel for basic reporting, updates, and operational tracking
  • Operate Material Handling Equipment (MHE) safely and effectively
  • Lift and move cargo (up to 20kg) as part of daily operations
  • Maintain workplace safety, cleanliness, and orderliness at all times
  • Support colleagues when required and help train new staff
  • Meet performance and accuracy targets set by supervisors

What We’re Looking For

  • Prior experience in warehouse operations (inbound through outbound)
  • Hands-on experience with WMS and comfortable with Excel basics
  • Able to safely lift and handle cargo up to 20kg
  • Experience with MHE (pallet jacks, stackers, or forklifts preferred)
  • Reliable, disciplined, and willing to take ownership of tasks
  • Hungry to learn, adaptable, and keen to evolve with the business

Why Join Us

  • Be part of a growing team managing both e-commerce and B2B logistics
  • Clear SOPs, structured training, and real opportunities to grow
  • A role where effort and performance are recognized

postedCompany.description:
FIEGE LOGISTICS PTE. LTD. | FIEGE Singapore

The FIEGE Group, headquartered in Greven in Westphalia, is a leading European logistics company that specializes in efficient supply chain solutions. With a workforce of over 15,000 at more than 150 sites, FIEGE operates on an international scale from core markets in Europe, to India and China.

Since its formation by Joan Joseph Fiege in 1873, FIEGE has been family-run – and still is to date, by now in the fifth generation. The cousins Jens and Felix Fiege are part of the four-member Executive Board and manage the company in dual leadership.

FIEGE is seen as a pioneer of contract logistics and since its formation has evolved from a transport company to a globally operating full-service logistics provider. The tradition-conscious organization never ceases to reinvent itself in order to remain state of the art in times of digitization and automation.

FIEGE focuses on these core sectors: Fashion, Healthcare, Industry, Consumer Goods, Tires, Media & Mail and Multi-channel Retail. We develop integrated customer solutions for eCommerce, transport, sea and air cargo, customs clearance, warehousing, parcel deliveries and real estate management, with services that span the full range from consultation to implementation of a supply chain concept.
postedCompany.name: FIEGE LOGISTICS PTE. LTD.
